feature.name: Regex lexer core
feature.description: Extract Pygments lexer infrastructure and Python lexer tokenization as a standalone package.
included_behaviors: tokenize Python source with PythonLexer and lex()
resolve lexers by alias with get_lexer_by_name
emit Token types for keywords, strings, comments, numbers, operators, and names
honor lexer options such as stripall and ensurenl
support modeline and encoding helpers used by lexer lookup
excluded_behaviors: HTML, LaTeX, terminal, and other formatters

entanglement.description: Lexer tokenization couples regex state machines, token types, filter hooks, plugin lookup, and lexer registry state across multiple modules.
signals: RegexLexer state stack and rule matching
token type hierarchy shared with filters
lexer cache and alias mapping in lexers package

output.import: from featurelifted import lex, get_lexer_by_name, PythonLexer; from featurelifted import token
output.signature: lex(code: str, lexer: Lexer) -> Iterable[tuple[token._TokenType, str]]
